cat about.txt

About

I'm a web developer specializing in front-end development, experienced across most stages of the build cycle for dynamic web projects — from clarifying a client's goals to shipping a working page.

I work comfortably in HTML5, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP, and I build primarily on WordPress, Elementor, Oxygen Builder, Divi, and Webflow. Beyond building pages, I design funnels and automations inside GoHighLevel — subaccounts, integrations, and CRM workflows for client businesses.

I'm actively integrating AI into my workflow for both web development and business automation. I use AI tools to speed up development, generate and refine code, troubleshoot technical issues, create content, and streamline repetitive tasks. For client businesses, I build AI-assisted workflows that improve lead management, customer communication, and operational efficiency, allowing projects to be delivered faster while maintaining quality and accuracy.

Currently sharpening my SEO practice using Google Webmaster Tools, and I bring a technical-support background to every project — comfortable troubleshooting hardware, software, and hosting (cPanel) issues along the way.

In the workspace

// dev_mode: active

When I'm not writing HTML, I'm usually deep in a terminal — writing scripts, tracing bugs through GoHighLevel workflows, or rebuilding something until it clicks. Code is best understood by building.

My setup keeps things minimal: a clean editor, a browser DevTools panel, and whatever it takes to ship something that actually works. I've been doing this since 2018 — and the process keeps evolving.
